season_weather: 梅雨。じめじめした蒸し暑さ。紫陽花（アジサイ）が咲く。傘が手放せない
casual_outfit: Pastel off-shoulder top, flowy beige midi skirt, denim jacket, white slip-on sandals, crossbody bag, oversized sunglasses.
room_wear: pastel yellow cropped zip-up hoodie and matching wide-leg shorts set
pajamas: light cotton pajama set in pale pink gingham-check pattern
room_base: Tokyo 6-tatami one-room apartment. White bed cover, natural wood bed frame. White desk near the window with a MacBook Air M2 in Starlight. Beige lace curtains. White walls with a few postcards pinned. Warm-colored table lamp.
room_clutter: headphones resting on the desk next to the MacBook, cable loosely coiled
room_seasonal: a small hydrangea (ajisai) in a vase on the windowsill

afternoon.label: 講義2コマ
afternoon.scene: university classroom or campus corridor after two lectures
afternoon.story_scene: campus cafeteria during lunch break between lectures, phone on table

feed_food_scene: strawberry shortcake slice on a white plate, warm blurred cafe interior behind it
